title: 10 health benefits of Citrullus vulgaris (watermelon)
intro: Citrullus vulgaris has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The citrulline content in its rind and seeds acts as a natural diuretic, relieving water retention and promoting healthy blood flow. Additionally, its vitamins A and C help boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. For instance, consuming watermelon juice has been shown to improve cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure and triglycerides, ultimately leading to a lower risk of heart disease and stroke.
